description_long: This object consists of two potted plants, each housed in a distinct geometric container—one a gray cylinder and the other a white cube. Both pots contain lush green foliage with broad, oval leaves, and visible brown stems emerging from a soil-like substrate. The leaves are dense and layered, creating a full, healthy appearance. The pots themselves are plain and unadorned, with smooth surfaces and no visible decorative elements. The overall look is modern and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary urban environments. The plants appear to be of the Ficus elastica (rubber plant) variety, commonly used for indoor or patio decoration.
description: A pair of modern potted plants with broad green leaves in plain gray cylindrical and white cubic pots, featuring dense foliage and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the cubic and cylindrical pots side by side, with dense green foliage emerging from each.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the stems and the profile of the pots, with leaves extending outward.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the lush, overlapping leaves and the open tops of the pots with visible soil.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of the pots and the trailing stems and leaves.
